ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host who owns the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., private room, entire apartment) */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., private room, entire home/apt) */,
  "accommodates" INTEGER /* Number of guests the property can accommodate */,
  "bathrooms" TEXT /* Description of the bathrooms (e.g., 1 private bath) */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds in the property */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the property per night */,
  "neighbourhood" INTEGER /* Neighbourhood ID where the property is located */,
  "property_title" TEXT /* Title of the property for better search and display */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* JSON column to store a flexible list of amenities */,
  "availability" TEXT /* JSON column to store availability dates */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the property was listed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the property was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_neighbourhood FOREIGN KEY ("neighbourhood") REFERENCES neighbourhoods ("neighbourhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_response_time" TEXT /* Host's response time (e.g., within an hour, none) */,
  "host_is_superhost" INTEGER /* Whether the host is a superhost */,
  "host_has_profile_pic" INTEGER /* Whether the host has a profile picture */,
  "host_identity_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the host's identity is verified */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Full name of the host */,
  "host_email" TEXT /* Email address of the host */,
  "host_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the host */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the host account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the host account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighbourhoods" (
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighbourhood */,
  "neighbourhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighbourhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighbourhood is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the neighbourhood is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighbourhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property offering the amenity */,
  "essentials" INTEGER /* Whether the property offers essentials */,
  "cooking" INTEGER /* Whether the property offers cooking facilities */,
  "balcony" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a balcony */,
  "parking" INTEGER /* Whether the property offers parking */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the amenity was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the amenity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being reviewed */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the guest (out of 5) */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_rating_cleanliness" REAL /* Rating for cleanliness */,
  "review_rating_communication" REAL /* Rating for communication */,
  "review_rating_value" REAL /* Rating for value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the review was posted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Full name of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the guest account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the guest account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being booked */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest who made the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the booking */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the booking */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the booking */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "cancellation_policy" TEXT /* Cancellation policy for the booking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the booking was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the booking was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
